name: Taiwan Navigation Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Navigation Co., Ltd. provides shipping services in Taiwan. It provides passenger and freight transportation services via water; port warehousing; aquatic sand mining; navigation channel dredging services; and tugboats, as well as acts as a land owner in agreements with construction companies for the use of its land for the construction of residential and commercial buildings for sale and rental. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 34 vessels. Taiwan Navigation Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
